# Template Pack (POC)

This directory contains starter templates for standards and regulatory/governance policies.

## Included
- `standards_template_basic.json`
- `regulatory_template_basic.json`

## Usage model
Users can:
1. Select one or more predefined templates.
2. Edit values in the app UI.
3. Upload custom documents/rules outside the template format.

These templates are intentionally generic and should be customized per customer domain.
